name: Sweet 'n' Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 small green pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork shoulder into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Seed and chop the green pepper into 1-inch pieces.
3. Combine pork, onion, pineapple with juice, brown sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, soy sauce, salt, ground ginger, green pepper, and pea pods in a 2-quart casserole.
4. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until the pork is no longer pink, stirring every 3 minutes for 24 to 28 minutes.
5. Stir in the green pepper and pea pods. Cover and microwave on high (100%) until the green pepper and pea pods are tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
